home.hero: Find the right gym — not just the nearest one.
home.heroSub: Search gyms by racks, machines, and real training gear.

submit.title: Add a Gym
submit.description: Know a gym that's not listed? Add it here.
submit.updateDescription: Seen newer equipment info? Send an update for review.
submit.equipmentBrandsHint: Select brands you have seen in this gym.
submit.featureStateHint: Tap each item to cycle Yes, No, and Unknown.
submit.successMessage: Thanks. Your submission is pending review.
submit.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.
submit.noChangesError: Please change at least one field before submitting.

equipmentPages.communityNote: Equipment data is contributed by gym-goers and may need verification. If you trained somewhere recently, help keep this list accurate.
equipmentPages.gymListSubtitle: Verified and recently updated gyms are surfaced first.
equipmentPages.noResultsSub: Be the first to add this equipment data for the Hong Kong training community.

hack-squat.title: Gyms with Hack Squat in Hong Kong
hack-squat.description: Find Hong Kong gyms with a hack squat machine, grouped by district and verified equipment data where available.
hack-squat.h1: Gyms with Hack Squat in Hong Kong
hack-squat.intro: Looking for a hack squat machine in Hong Kong? This page lists gyms where Gymory has a positive hack squat signal, with district links and community verification prompts.
hack-squat.criteria: A gym appears here when its equipment data says a hack squat machine is available.

ski-erg.title: Gyms with SkiErg in Hong Kong
ski-erg.description: Find Hong Kong gyms with SkiErg machines for HYROX and hybrid training.
ski-erg.h1: Gyms with SkiErg in Hong Kong
ski-erg.intro: SkiErg access matters for HYROX, conditioning, and hybrid training blocks. This page lists Hong Kong gyms with recorded SkiErg availability.
ski-erg.criteria: A gym appears here when its SkiErg count is greater than zero.

sled.title: Gyms with Sled Push in Hong Kong
sled.description: Find Hong Kong gyms with sled equipment for HYROX, conditioning, and power training.
sled.h1: Gyms with Sled Push in Hong Kong
sled.intro: Sled space can be hard to confirm from normal gym listings. Gymory tracks gyms with recorded sled equipment so you can plan HYROX and conditioning sessions.
sled.criteria: A gym appears here when its sled count is greater than zero.

power-rack.title: Gyms with Power Racks in Hong Kong
power-rack.description: Find Hong Kong gyms with racks for squats, strength training, and powerlifting-style sessions.
power-rack.h1: Gyms with Power Racks in Hong Kong
power-rack.intro: Racks are one of the clearest signals that a gym can support serious strength training. This page lists gyms with at least one recorded rack.
power-rack.criteria: A gym appears here when its rack count is greater than zero.

deadlift-platform.title: Gyms with Deadlift Platforms in Hong Kong
deadlift-platform.description: Find Hong Kong gyms with deadlift platforms or lifting platforms for strength training.
deadlift-platform.h1: Gyms with Deadlift Platforms in Hong Kong
deadlift-platform.intro: Deadlift-friendly setups are not always obvious from photos or gym websites. This page lists gyms with recorded deadlift platforms or platform counts.
deadlift-platform.criteria: A gym appears here when it has a deadlift platform signal or a platform count greater than zero.

assault-bike.title: Gyms with Assault Bikes in Hong Kong
assault-bike.description: Find Hong Kong gyms with assault bikes for conditioning, HYROX-style work, and hybrid training.
assault-bike.h1: Gyms with Assault Bikes in Hong Kong
assault-bike.intro: Assault bikes are useful for conditioning, intervals, and hybrid training. This page lists gyms with recorded assault bike availability.
assault-bike.criteria: A gym appears here when its assault bike count is greater than zero.

rower.title: Gyms with Rowers in Hong Kong
rower.description: Find Hong Kong gyms with rowing machines for HYROX, cardio, and hybrid training.
rower.h1: Gyms with Rowers in Hong Kong
rower.intro: Rowers are a key part of many conditioning and HYROX sessions. This page lists gyms with recorded rower availability.
rower.criteria: A gym appears here when its rower count is greater than zero.

wall-ball.title: Gyms with Wall Balls in Hong Kong
wall-ball.description: Find Hong Kong gyms with wall balls or wall ball targets for HYROX training.
wall-ball.h1: Gyms with Wall Balls in Hong Kong
wall-ball.intro: Wall balls and targets are easy to miss in generic gym listings. This page tracks gyms where wall ball equipment has been recorded.
wall-ball.criteria: A gym appears here when it has wall balls, wall ball counts, or wall ball target plates recorded.

heavy-dumbbells.title: Gyms with Heavy Dumbbells in Hong Kong
heavy-dumbbells.description: Find Hong Kong gyms with dumbbells up to 40kg or heavier.
heavy-dumbbells.h1: Gyms with Heavy Dumbbells in Hong Kong
heavy-dumbbells.intro: If your program needs heavier dumbbells, a normal gym listing rarely tells you the top weight. This page lists gyms with dumbbells recorded at 40kg or heavier.
heavy-dumbbells.criteria: A gym appears here when its recorded maximum dumbbell weight is at least 40kg.

eleiko.title: Gyms with Eleiko Equipment in Hong Kong
eleiko.description: Find Hong Kong gyms where Eleiko equipment has been recorded by Gymory.
eleiko.h1: Gyms with Eleiko Equipment in Hong Kong
eleiko.intro: Eleiko equipment is a useful signal for serious strength and weightlifting setups. This page lists gyms where Eleiko has been recorded in Gymory brand inventory.
eleiko.criteria: A gym appears here when its brand inventory includes Eleiko.

districtEquipmentPages.title: Gyms with {equipment} in {district}
districtEquipmentPages.description: Find gyms with {equipment} in {district}, Hong Kong, with community-contributed equipment data and verification signals.
districtEquipmentPages.intro: Looking for {equipment} in {district}? This page filters Gymory's Hong Kong gym database to show places where this equipment has been recorded.

contributors.title: Gymory Contributors
contributors.description: See Gymory contributors helping the Hong Kong training community keep gym equipment data accurate.
contributors.intro: These contributors help keep Gymory useful by submitting gym equipment updates, first sightings, and accuracy checks for the Hong Kong training community.
contributors.profileDescription: View {name}'s Gymory contributor stats and badges.
contributors.emptyDescription: Approved submissions will appear here once the community starts filling equipment data.

account.title: Account Settings
account.description: Update your Gymory contributor display name and handle.
account.intro: Control how your contributor identity appears on Gymory.
account.handleHint: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
account.avatarNote: This photo appears on contributor pages and reviewed submissions.
account.avatarUploadHint: JPG, PNG, or WebP. Maximum 2 MB.
account.avatarDragHint: Drag the photo to reposition it.

errors.display_name_too_short: Display name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.display_name_too_long: Display name must be 40 characters or fewer.
errors.handle_too_short: Handle must be at least 3 characters.
errors.handle_too_long: Handle must be 30 characters or fewer.
errors.handle_invalid: Handle can only use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
errors.avatar_url_too_long: Profile photo URL must be 500 characters or fewer.
errors.avatar_url_invalid: Enter a valid profile photo URL.
errors.avatar_url_https_only: Profile photo URL must start with https://.
errors.avatar_file_type_invalid: Profile photo must be a JPG, PNG, or WebP image.
errors.avatar_file_too_large: Profile photo must be 2 MB or smaller.
errors.avatar_upload_failed: Unable to upload profile photo right now.
errors.invalid_payload: Please check the form and try again.
errors.generic: Unable to update profile right now.

brandPages.title: Gyms with {brand} Equipment in Hong Kong
brandPages.description: Find Hong Kong gyms where {brand} equipment has been recorded by Gymory's community equipment database.
brandPages.h1: Gyms with {brand} Equipment in Hong Kong
brandPages.intro: Looking for gyms with {brand} equipment? This page lists Hong Kong gyms where Gymory has a recorded brand signal, with verified and recently updated gyms surfaced first.
brandPages.dataNote: {brand} data is contributed by gym-goers and may need verification. If you have trained somewhere with this equipment, help keep the record accurate.
brandPages.gymListSubtitle: Verified and recently updated gyms are surfaced first.
brandPages.noResultsSub: This brand page is available, but it will only be indexed once Gymory has matching gym data.

trainingPages.communityNote: Equipment data is contributed by gym-goers. If a gym is missing a signal you have seen in person, help verify it for the Hong Kong training community.
trainingPages.gymListTitle: Gyms matching this training use case
trainingPages.gymListSubtitle: Gyms with more matching equipment signals are surfaced first.
trainingPages.noResultsSub: Be the first to add training equipment data for this category.

hyrox-friendly-hong-kong.title: HYROX Gyms in Hong Kong
hyrox-friendly-hong-kong.description: Find Hong Kong gyms with HYROX-relevant equipment such as SkiErg, sleds, rowers, wall balls, and assault bikes.
hyrox-friendly-hong-kong.intro: HYROX training depends on a full race-prep setup that normal gym listings often miss. This page only highlights Hong Kong gyms where Gymory has recorded the core HYROX equipment set.
hyrox-friendly-hong-kong.criteria: A gym appears here only when Gymory has recorded all of these: assault runner, SkiErg, sled, rower, 4kg wall ball, 6kg wall ball, 10kg sandbag, 20kg sandbag, 16kg kettlebell, and 24kg kettlebell.

hyrox-official-hong-kong.title: Official HYROX Gyms in Hong Kong
hyrox-official-hong-kong.description: Find Hong Kong gyms listed on the HYROX partner gym finder.
hyrox-official-hong-kong.h1: Official HYROX Gyms in Hong Kong
hyrox-official-hong-kong.intro: This page highlights Hong Kong gyms that are listed by the HYROX partner gym finder, so athletes can separate official partner locations from equipment-based HYROX-friendly gyms.
hyrox-official-hong-kong.criteria: A gym appears here only when Gymory has matched it to the HYROX partner gym finder source.

olympic-lifting-hong-kong.title: Olympic Lifting Gyms in Hong Kong
olympic-lifting-hong-kong.description: Find Hong Kong gyms with Olympic lifting essentials: platforms, barbells, and recorded plate data.
olympic-lifting-hong-kong.h1: Olympic Lifting Gyms in Hong Kong
olympic-lifting-hong-kong.intro: Olympic lifting needs a platform, a barbell, and plates that are suitable for repeated lifts from the floor. This page highlights Hong Kong gyms where Gymory has recorded those core lifting signals.
olympic-lifting-hong-kong.criteria: A gym appears here only when Gymory has recorded all of these: platform count greater than zero, barbell count greater than zero, and plate data.

powerlifting-hong-kong.title: Powerlifting Gyms in Hong Kong
powerlifting-hong-kong.description: Find Hong Kong gyms with powerlifting-relevant equipment such as racks, platforms, barbells, benches, and deadlift platforms.
powerlifting-hong-kong.intro: Powerlifting-friendly gyms need the basics to be reliable: rack, barbell, and plates. This page highlights Hong Kong gyms where Gymory has recorded those core strength training signals.
powerlifting-hong-kong.criteria: A gym appears here only when Gymory has recorded all of these: rack count greater than zero, barbell count greater than zero, and plate data. Platforms and specialty bars may still appear as extra signals when available.

bodybuilding-hong-kong.title: Bodybuilding Gyms in Hong Kong
bodybuilding-hong-kong.description: Find Hong Kong gyms with bodybuilding-relevant machines such as hack squat, leg press, chest press, rows, pulldowns, and isolation machines.
bodybuilding-hong-kong.intro: Bodybuilding training often comes down to machine selection across multiple body parts. This page highlights Hong Kong gyms with enough recorded machine variety for chest, back, shoulders, and legs.
bodybuilding-hong-kong.criteria: A gym appears here only when Gymory has recorded at least two chest machine signals, at least two back machine signals, at least two shoulder machine signals, and at least two leg machine signals.

hybrid-training-hong-kong.title: Hybrid Training Gyms in Hong Kong
hybrid-training-hong-kong.description: Find Hong Kong gyms for hybrid training with strength, conditioning, and HYROX-style equipment signals.
hybrid-training-hong-kong.h1: Hybrid Training Gyms in Hong Kong
hybrid-training-hong-kong.intro: Hybrid athletes need a mix of strength, conditioning, and athletic movement tools. This page highlights Hong Kong gyms with recorded plyo box access plus both strength and conditioning signals.
hybrid-training-hong-kong.criteria: A gym appears here only when Gymory has recorded a plyo box, at least one strength signal (rack, platform, or barbell), and at least one conditioning signal (SkiErg, sled, rower, assault bike, or treadmill).

login.title: Sign in for more features
login.description: Sign in to unlock comments, voting, and admin tools based on your role.
